about.title: About GradeMaster
about.description: GradeMaster is your personal study assistant. Instantly calculate results, predict SOCH scores, and analyze your performance to stay one step ahead.

official.title: Official:
official.text: successfully implemented and supported by the administration of LLP 'Economic Lyceum'.

reliability.title: Reliability:
reliability.text: open source under the MIT license.

privacy.title: Privacy:
privacy.text: calculations run locally in your browser.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a2: GPA (Grade Point Average) is an international standard for average grades, used for admission to foreign educational institutions (USA, Europe, China, etc.). I added this calculation so you can estimate your chances in advance when planning to study abroad.
faq.a3: All your data is stored exclusively locally — in your browser's memory. The application does not send information to any server, ensuring complete privacy of your academic performance.
faq.a4: No, this project was created exclusively for the convenience of students and is non-commercial. The use of all site features will always remain free.
faq.q5: How can I contact the author?
faq.a5: You can use the 'Contact Information' section below. I try to reply to all messages in Telegram and WhatsApp as soon as possible.
faq.q6: Can I calculate the semester grade?
faq.a6: Of course! To do this, simply enter all your FA and SA grades for both quarters at once, and leave the SOCH field empty.

author.title: About the author
author.name: Alexey Kim (KAT1403)
author.bio: I am the sole author of the project. The project was developed to simplify the process of tracking, calculating, and predicting academic results for students in Kazakhstan.

header.betaTooltip: Project in beta mode. If you find a bug —

history.title: Calculation History
history.reset_modal_desc: Save current grades to history before resetting?
history.empty: History is empty. Save grades for them to appear here.

predictor.title: Grade Predictor
predictor.need_extra_fo: You need {{count}} more FA grades of 10 points
predictor.need_soch_score: You need {{score}} out of {{max}} for SOCH

empty.title: No Grades
empty.description: Add at least one grade in the Calculator to make a prediction.

scenarios.zero_soch_enough: You already have enough points that even 0 for SOCH will keep your grade at {{grade}}.
scenarios.soch_possible: To get a {{grade}}, score at least {{percent}}% on the upcoming SOCH.
scenarios.soch_score_needed: To get a {{grade}}, you need to score {{score}} out of {{max}} points ({{percent}}%).
scenarios.soch_impossible: Even maximum points for SOCH ({{max}}/{{max}} - 100%) won't be enough for a {{grade}}.
scenarios.fo_possible: To reach a {{grade}} through FA, you need to get {{count}} consecutive '10' grades.
scenarios.fo_not_needed: No extra FA is needed to achieve the goal.
scenarios.fo_impossible: It's mathematically impossible to reach a {{grade}} solely through FA.

safety_net.title: To Avoid 2 or 3
safety_net.avoid_3: To avoid a 3 for the quarter, score at least {{percent}}% on SOCH.
safety_net.avoid_3_with_score: To avoid a 3 for the quarter, you need to score {{score}} out of {{max}} points ({{percent}}%).
safety_net.avoid_3_impossible: Even 100% on SOCH won't help you avoid a 3.
safety_net.avoid_2: To avoid a 2 for the quarter, score at least {{percent}}% on SOCH.
safety_net.avoid_2_with_score: To avoid a 2 for the quarter, you need to score {{score}} out of {{max}} points ({{percent}}%).
safety_net.avoid_2_impossible: Even 100% on SOCH won't help you avoid a 2.

error_margin.title: Margin of Error (FA)
error_margin.below_target_good: You currently have {{current}}%, a '{{score}}' might improve the situation!
error_margin.below_target_bad: You currently have {{current}}%, which is below the target {{target}}. Getting a '{{score}}' will only make it worse.
error_margin.improves: A '{{score}}' will improve your overall score!
error_margin.allowed: You can get a '{{score}}' for FA {{count}} time(s), and you will still maintain your target {{target}}!
error_margin.none: None! If you get a '{{score}}' now, your grade will drop below {{target}}.
error_margin.tooltip: How many bad FA grades you can get without losing your target grade (ignoring the upcoming SOCH).

probability.title: Probability of Success
probability.tooltip: Based on your current performance. Shows how realistic it is to achieve your goal.

smart_paste.title: Paste Grades
smart_paste.instruction: Copy grades straight from your electronic diary and paste them here. We will fill them in for you.
smart_paste.mobile_tip: Tip: On your phone, you can copy text straight from a screenshot.

analytics.title: Analytics and Trends
analytics.mean_tooltip: The arithmetic average of your FA grades.
analytics.volatility_tooltip: The lower the volatility, the more stable your results.
analytics.trend_tooltip: The solid line shows your actual grades, and the dotted line shows the predicted ones.
analytics.stability_tooltip: How much your FA grades match your SA and SOCH grades. If FA is high but SOCH is low, validity drops.
analytics.stability_desc: Comparing average FA to SA/SOCH results
